历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 11151 → 20319 → 11735 → 21366 → 12499, with significant fluctuations in recent years. The 2025 baseline is about 12499, a substantial increase of about 8867 positions compared to 2024, indicating a clear rebound in application popularity. The university's enrollment plan in Shanxi for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 was 51, 52, 52, 47, and 53 respectively; the 2026 plan is 61, an expansion of about 15.1% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion, easing competition pressure. It is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, it is approximately 52nd, with a continuous rise in recent years (from 65th in 2021 to 52nd in 2026), indicating steady improvement in overall strength.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2023, the reputation was somewhat negative due to a university management incident, but there have been no major public controversies recently; Douyin popularity ranking is 71st (average), short video exposure is moderate, and application attention is stable; Light Industry Technology and Engineering is A+, Food Science and Engineering is A+, both at the national top level, directly corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Food Science and Engineering and Brewing Engineering, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity; Food Science and Engineering (A+), as a flagship major, has stable popularity; in 2026, there are 167,419 Physics Category candidates in the province, a decrease of about 3.4% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 12499, a significant expansion of about 15% in 2026, and a slight decrease of 3.4% in provincial Physics Category candidates, the expansion effect dominates. It is expected that the 2026 admission ranking will shift backward compared to 2025 (easier to enter); the predicted minimum ranking is about 13681, with a range of 13181 to 14181.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 13181 to 14181, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Food Science and Engineering A+ flagship major is worth considering), use Tier 1 majors (Clinical Medicine Excellent Class, Computer Science, etc.) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 13000), you can focus on sprinting for popular Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1988 → 3367 → 1580 → 4764 → 2505, with significant fluctuations in recent years. The baseline for 2025 is around 2505. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Shanxi was 15 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 9 in 2025, and further reduced to 6 in 2026, a 33.3% reduction compared to 2025, indicating a significant contraction and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 52nd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a continuously rising ranking in recent years and steadily improving comprehensive strength. Its reputation has been stable recently, with no major negative public incidents. It ranks 71st in Douyin popularity (average), indicating moderate application attention. Its Light Industry Technology and Engineering is rated A+, and Food Science and Engineering is rated A+. Although these are strong disciplines in science and engineering, their impact on liberal arts majors is limited. Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature have not entered the A-class discipline evaluation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a relatively high social popularity (recommended), Chinese Language and Literature is also relatively popular (recommended), while teacher training/education is divided and wait-and-see. In 2026, there are 63,113 History Category examinees in the province, a significant decrease of about 25.6% compared to 2025, leading to a notable easing of competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2505, the significant 33.3% enrollment reduction in 2026, and the substantial 25.6% decrease in History Category examinees in the province, the effects of enrollment reduction and examinee reduction offset each other, with the enrollment reduction slightly dominating. It is expected that the 2026 admission ranking will be slightly higher (harder to enter) than in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2084, with a range of 1709 to 2459.
